description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Flatpak that runs on pull requests and on push to the master branch or tags matching v*. Use a matrix job strategy to build Flatpak packages on ubuntu-24.04 for x86_64 and aarch64 architectures. Checkout the repository with submodules, build Flatpak packages using the flathub-infra/flatpak-github-actions tool, and create GitHub releases for continuous builds and tagged releases.
